gallery.text.1: Diagram of physical disk layout, VG and LV allocations and filesystem layout.
gallery.text.2: Example ACLs for Zookeeper (994) user and service account keytabs, in addition to client keytab.
gallery.text.3: LDAP query against gidNumber=994. From the transcript, it is apparent that GSSAPI was used for authentication and SASL was transparently used to mediate that transaction.
gallery.text.4: SSH login session on forge, my VM host. The list of mounts, the multidevice status (software RAID1) and representative NFSv4 ACL statuses can be seen in the transcript.
